---
title: "Monte Carlo Methods for Strategic Models"
short-title: "Monte Carlo"
author: "Raban Heller"
date-modified: today
abstract: "Sampling, variance reduction, and when Monte Carlo beats analytical solutions."
keywords: ["Monte Carlo", "simulation", "variance reduction", "sampling"]
---

# Monte Carlo Methods {#sec-monte-carlo}

::: {.callout-note}
This chapter is under development.
:::
